indexes.name: regions_pkey
indexes.def: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX regions_pkey ON public.regions USING btree (country_code, region_code)

indexes.name: stores_pkey
indexes.def: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX stores_pkey ON public.stores USING btree (store_id)

constraints.name: fk_store_region
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (country_code, region_code) REFERENCES regions(country_code, region_code) ON DELETE CASCADE

relations.def: FOREIGN KEY (country_code, region_code) REFERENCES regions(country_code, region_code) ON DELETE CASCADE

driver.name: postgres
driver.database_version: PostgreSQL 16.2 (Debian 16.2-1.pgdg120+2) on aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu, compiled by gcc (Debian 12.2.0-14) 12.2.0, 64-bit
